subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! By the life of God, thy remembrance hath been in the Most Holy Court, time after time, through the bounties of God, exalted be His glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی لعمر الله ذکرت در ساحت اقدس بوده و مره بعد مره بعنایات حق جل جلاله
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @the Kingdom of God [Malakut]
